arts.ttl: Chris Dobey's relationship with Alan Shearer after Newcastle icon's text to darts star
arts.sum: The devoted Newcastle United fan couldn't contain his joy upon receiving a text from the Magpies icon after his Masters victory in 2023, an achievement that also landed him a spot in that year's Premier League. He told to Sky Sports: "It was great to get a text from Alan Shearer on the Monday morning.

arts.sum: Newcastle United travel to Ipswich Town this weekend looking to build on the momentum of a positive week. After thrashing Leicester City 4-0 in the Premier League last weekend, the Magpies booked their place in the Carabao Cup semi-finals by beating Brentford in midweek. arts.ttl: West Ham chief put right on 'very unclear' Newcastle United situation as minister apologises
arts.sum: West Ham vice-chairman Karren Brady has claimed it is a 'very unclear' situation - but Saudi Arabia's Crown Prince would only have to undergo the independent football regulator's test if there were 'grounds for concern'. "On the very unclear situation of Newcastle United, the minister confirmed that the Crown Prince would be subject to the owners’ test, and the issue of significant influence would mean that this is the case.

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk sees huge Newcastle United stadium 'extra' that is coming Arsenal's way
arts.sum: Dan Burn has revealed that opposition players know how Geordies play a 'huge part' at St James' Park after Liverpool captain Virgil van Dijk saw Newcastle United 'feed' off the crowd. "After the Liverpool game here earlier this month, Virgil van Dijk commented in the press on how much our crowd lifts us when we play at home...opposition players know how much of a huge part you play in our performance," the Newcastle defender wrote in his programme notes ahead of the quarter-final win against Brentford.

arts.ttl: Newcastle’s Sandro Tonali Eyeing Summer Exit Amid Juventus, PSG Interest
Newcastle see Johan Bakayoko transfer opportunity as Marc Guehi similarity clear
arts.sum: Crucially, away from the pitch, the player's contract currently runs out in 2026, meaning the January window could be the last chance for PSV to cash in before his market value plummets as he enters the final months of his deal. PSV, according to well-placed sources in the Netherlands, have rather overambitious hopes of holding out for a big fee for Bakayoko's services next month, while Newcastle are looking for a knockdown price given the player's contract situation and the fact they remain in a tricky position, financially, themselves heading into next month's window.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United star reveals his one transfer wish – Magpies fans can rest easy for now
arts.sum: Newcastle United midfielder Bruno Guimarães has revealed he wants to play for Vasco in future, despite starting his career with Athletico. O Globo cover comments from the Newcastle United star today, made to EPSN, in which he reveals playing for Vasco would be the fulfilment of his father’s dreams.
